title: Patalpani waterfall
tagline: Patalpani waterfall — heritage city of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: The Patalpani Waterfall is a waterfall on the Choral River, a tributary of the Narmada, located in the Mhow Tehsil of Indore district in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India.
overview.description: The Patalpani Waterfall is a waterfall on the Choral River, a tributary of the Narmada, located in the Mhow Tehsil of Indore district in the state of Madhya Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Mhow
topPlaces.description: Mhow, officially Dr. Ambedkar Nagar, is a town in the Indore district in Madhya Pradesh state of India.

topPlaces.name: Dongargaon, Indore
topPlaces.description: Dongargaon is a village located in Indore District, Madhya Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Christ Church, Mhow
topPlaces.description: Christ Church is a non-denominational Christian church, previously Anglican, located on Mall Road, Mhow, Madhya Pradesh, India. It was built by men of the Warwickshire and Brecknockshire regiments, the first British army units to be based in Mhow, as a garrison church, and consecrated in 1823.

topPlaces.name: Mhowgaon
topPlaces.description: Mhowgaon () is a Nagar Panchayat under Sub Division Dr. Ambedkar Nagar (Mhow) in Indore district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Tihi
topPlaces.description: Tihi or Teehe is a Gram Panchayat under sub-division Dr. Ambedkar Nagar (Mhow) in Indore district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.

items.note: Mhow, officially Dr. Ambedkar Nagar, is a town in the Indore district in Madhya Pradesh state of India.
Dongargaon is a village located in Indore District, Madhya Pradesh, India.

Christ Church is a non-denominational Christian church, previously Anglican, located on Mall Road, Mhow, Madhya Pradesh, India. It was built by men of the Warwickshire and Brecknockshire regiments, the first British army units to be based in Mhow, as a garrison church, and consecrated in 1823.
Mhowgaon () is a Nagar Panchayat under Sub Division Dr. Ambedkar Nagar (Mhow) in Indore district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.
Tihi or Teehe is a Gram Panchayat under sub-division Dr. Ambedkar Nagar (Mhow) in Indore district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Patalpani waterfall?
faq.a: The best time to visit Patalpani waterfall is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Patalpani waterfall?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Devi Ahilya Bai Holkar Airport, Indore (24 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhopal Junction (185 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Patalpani waterfall?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Patalpani waterfall at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Patalpani waterfall?
faq.a: Stays in Patalpani waterfall start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Patalpani waterfall?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mhow, Dongargaon, Indore, Christ Church, Mhow, Mhowgaon, Tihi.
